purpose: Adds an emoji composer picker to the ChatBox toolbar. Users can open a 24-glyph popover grid, click a glyph to insert it at the current textarea cursor position, and close via Escape/outside-click. Also includes a Cmd/Ctrl+Shift+E keyboard shortcut. The cursor-insertion logic is extracted into a pure helper in lib/reactions/ for independent unit testing.

public_api.name: EmojiComposerPicker
public_api.description: Self-contained Chakra Popover component. Owns its own useDisclosure state. Renders the trigger IconButton (data-testid='emoji-composer-trigger') and the 24-glyph grid. Exposes a toggle() method via an imperative handle — OR, simpler: accepts an optional isOpen/onToggle from the parent so ChatBox can wire Cmd+Shift+E.

public_api.name: EmojiComposerPickerHandle
public_api.description: Ref handle exposed via useImperativeHandle so ChatBox's keyboard handler can toggle the popover without lifting state.

public_api.name: insertAtCursor
public_api.signature: (current: string, selectionStart: number | null, selectionEnd: number | null, emoji: string) => { value: string; nextCaret: number }
public_api.description: Pure function in app/src/lib/reactions/composeInsert.ts. Inserts emoji at cursor; appends when selection is null. Returns new value and caret position.

test_targets: app/src/lib/reactions/composeInsert.ts — pure unit tests via make test-unit
app/tests/e2e/emoji-composer.spec.ts — open/close picker, glyph click inserts at cursor, Escape closes, keyboard shortcut toggles
